---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes on doctoral research, neology, academic life, conferences, funding, and more"
description-meta: "Posts about papers, events, news, and more"

listing: 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  page-size: 100
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml

page-layout: full
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#posts}
:::
